item.title: A Prayer for the United States
item.description:
We need help here in the U.S
Squirrel Tax (one of my new little neighbors) It would be really awesome if you subscribed to my YouTube channel. I'm transitioning from TikTok and trying to reach a thousand followers. Less than a hundred to go! https://youtube.com/shorts/qpwAwdOkbKs?si=9R86aOEd15qKc76I On Tiktok too @gridsquares

item.title: Im surprised I haven't seen this here yet.
item.dc:creator: METROlD

item.title: Memes vol 550 Books!
item.description:
This is the funniest thing I’ve ever seen
I adore my kindle for this reason
I need to reread this series
The bottom one with Baz and the blood in his mouth is soooooo urghhhhhhhh
I love you Dallas Winston
I love you Ponyboy Curtis
Only one bed my favorite trope
Tender is the flesh is next up if I ever frickin find it and so is bones and all. But I am now interested in nightbitch if it has cannibalism. Who said that
I fucking HATED American psycho and I did not like the bell jar which was a DNF. But Boy parts, the secret history, the virgin suicides, a certain hunger, and bunny were all very good particularly those first two (boy parts and secret history)
I MADE THIS!!!! Stray dogs and BTTWNS are among my favorite comics I’ve ever read and I’ve only read snippets of beasts of burden and I really liked that too. I could have added “with super cute art styles”
This is from good omens I think?
I think this is Highgarden
This is from a book by Casey McQuiston called One Last Stop
LOOKING AT YOU LES MIS!!!!
Here are my bookshelves
Check out my profile on Goodreads! https://www.goodreads.com/user/show/145693422
Scruffy and Liza Jane tax
Froggy and Nessie tax
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: What Happened Today #65
item.description: ✊?? “Mega API,” mass firings, and mass protests—Trump’s machine is just getting started. Even as Americans flood the streets, Trump’s regime tightens its grip. DOGE is gutting the IRS and eyeing Palantir to wiretap your finances through a single system. Tariffs are crashing markets, and dissenters at FEMA, DHS, and DOE are getting purged. This isn’t policy—it’s regime mechanics. Call Congress. Call your state. Call bullshit. Subscribe free at https://govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://www.npr.org/2025/04/05/nx-s1-5353388/hands-off-protests-washington-dc 2. https://apnews.com/article/trump-el-salvador-prison-kilmar-abrego-garcia-5a92d6bd7f893eed64c2607cc129a6f9 3. https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/trump-administration/justice-department-places-attorney-struggled-explain-maryland-mans-dep-rcna199866 4. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn5x775plnlo 5. https://abcnews.go.com/International/wireStory/yemens-houthi-rebels-us-airstrikes-kill-2-trumps-120531604 6. https://www.upi.com/Top_News/US/2025/04/05/Trump-host-Netanyahu/5421743874799/ 7. https://www.theguardian.com/business/2025/apr/05/jaguar-land-rover-us-shipments-trumps-tariffs 8. https://www.nytimes.com/2025/04/05/us/politics/aid-workers-myanmar-fired.html 9. https://thehill.com/homenews/house/5234272-house-gop-senate-budget-blueprint-donald-trump-agenda/ 10. https://www.theglobeandmail.com/canada/article-canada-updates-travel-advisory-for-us-warning-of-heightened-scrutiny/ 11. https://www.wired.com/story/doge-hackathon-irs-data-palantir/ 12. https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2025/04/05/trump-tells-americans-hang-tough-universal-tariffs-begin/82953727007/ 13. https://www.politico.com/news/2025/04/04/fema-chief-given-lie-detector-test-after-leak-of-private-meeting-politico-00272302 14. https://www.masslive.com/news/2025/04/trump-administration-revokes-visas-of-5-umass-amherst-students.html 15. https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/us/new-york-public-schools-tell-trump-administration-they-won-t-comply-with-dei-order/ar-AA1Cmxvi

item.title: Protesters tell Trump, Musk: 'Hands off' the federal government
item.description: Demonstrators gathered at West Capitol Park in Albany on Saturday for a Hands Off! rally to call on the administration of President Donald Trump to keep its “hands off” key federal programs that are facing, or may face, cuts.
item.dc:creator: cryptoboss98

item.title: I need another cup of coffee ....
item.description: Admittedly Hawaii and Puerto Rico do produce coffee but nowhere near enough to meet America's needs. Besides, as much as I love Kona it's kind of pricey for the average household budget ...
